svg.text: Fermax 80447 Auto-Door Adapter — DIY Capability Build
Self-powered ring detector → 1.5 s delay → 1.5 s door pulse · 556 dual monostable, opto-isolated sense, dry-contact relay output
Mirror of Q1/K1/D2 above — drives J3 alligator-clip leads to P1 contacts
Notes: Logic & bus share GND (functional isolation only via opto + dry-contact relay). Self-powered from ring pulse — verify bulk cap holds 5V for full 1.5s door pulse on noisy bus before deploy.
Designer: Background agent (Claude Opus 4.7) · Issue 03573032 → DIY sub-issue · 2026-04-18 · KiCad 8.x project at /static/fermax-adapter/diy/kicad/
